name: California Fruit Terrine
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften gelatin in 2 cups grape juice.
2. Heat over low heat until dissolved.
3. Stir in remaining 2 cups grape juice.
4. Cool until slightly thickened.
5. Place 9-inch loaf pan in larger pan filled with ice cubes.
6. Pour small amount of gelatin mixture in bottom of pan to form thin layer.
7. Arrange half of strawberry slices and all kiwi slices in decorative pattern, handling kiwis as little as possible.
8. Allow to set.
9. Carefully arrange mango slices over surface to form another layer.
10. Spoon over more gelatin mixture to cover fruit. Again, allow to set.
11. Top with remaining sliced strawberries.
12. Spoon over more gelatin mixture to cover berries.
13. Allow to set.
14. Top with papaya slices.
15. Pour over remaining gelatin mixture.
16. Chill until completely set.
17. To make dressing, blend honey, mayonnaise and whipped cream. Add fruit puree.
18. Unmold terrine onto serving platter and cut into slices about 3/4-inch thick.
19. Serve each slice with dollop of dressing.
20. Garnish with mint sprigs and more fresh fruit, if desired.
